title: Ksenotopia Reworked
description:
Adventure × Create
A modpack for the Ksenotopia server.
body:
![Ksenotopia logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b26cc8ed88c912a4d811c3673f224265bd70de.png)
# A remarkable experience for every taste
_If you've been wanting to play minecraft with friends for a long time, but your tastes in mods are different, then **this modpack is for you!**_

## For those who love adventure
### New Bosses
**10+** new bosses smoothly distributed in progression. You will receive a **decent reward** for killing each of them

### New Dungeons
**Tons** of dungeons that are unique from biome to biome. In them you can find **unique artifacts** that qualitatively change the gameplay

### New Biomes
A variety of **atmospheric biomes** with unique ambient **structures** that will make your trip unforgettable

## For those who love technological progress
### Industrialization
**Create mod** as one of the best industrial mods of our time. Various factories, machine tools, trains and smart systems

### Massive additions
**Factory must grow!** New types of rails, airplanes, cars, electric machines, diesel generators have been added

### Unlimited factory
**Automate everything** with new crafting recipes

## Optimized for different capabilities
### Ksenotopia Standart
Do you want to see the **beautiful graphics**? Use the **standard version** of Ksenotopia \
_(8gb minimum | 10gb recommended)_

### Ksenotopia Lite
Still want to play, but **don't have a powerful PC**? Use the **lite version** of Ksenotopia \
_(4gb minimum | 6gb recommended)_

-----
#### Made for "Ksenotopia" server
